elements.domSnippet: Wishlist

issues.summary: Screen readers do not interpret the element as interactable.
issues.description:
**Cause:** Missing or incorrect semantics prevent screen readers from interpreting an element as interactable.
**Effect:** Screen reader either does not navigate to the element or navigates to it but does not correctly convey its function to the user.
**Suggested Solutions:**
* Change the element's tag to correctly reflect its type, ie: <*button*>, <*a*>, <*select*> or <*input*>
* Add attributes (ARIA) to indicate the element's type and/or potential functionalities.

elements.domSnippet: Wishlist

issues.summary: Keyboard-only users do not interpret the element as interactable.
issues.description:
**Cause:** Missing or incorrect semantics prevent the keyboard User-Agent from interpreting an element as interactable.
**Effect:** Interface interaction is limited for keyboard-only users.
**Suggested Solutions:**
* (Recommended) Add an element that better reflects the element's purpose. Interactive elements do not need any additions because they are focusable by nature.
* Add a *tabindex* attribute with the value of “0” to the element.

elements.domSnippet: Search

issues.summary: Screen readers do not interpret the element as interactable.
issues.description:
**Cause:** Missing or incorrect semantics prevent screen readers from interpreting an element as interactable.
**Effect:** Screen reader either does not navigate to the element or navigates to it but does not correctly convey its function to the user.
**Suggested Solutions:**
* Change the element's tag to correctly reflect its type, ie: <*button*>, <*a*>, <*select*> or <*input*>
* Add attributes (ARIA) to indicate the element's type and/or potential functionalities.

elements.domSnippet: Search

issues.summary: The element is missing a textual attribute that indicates which information or action is being asked of the user and/or the outcome of interacting with it.
issues.description:
**Cause:** An interactable element requires textual description in order to inform the screen reader of its purpose and function.
**Effect:** Insufficient information about the element limits its interactability.
**Suggested Solutions:**
* Add the appropriate descriptive text to the body of the tag.
* Add the appropriate attributes to the tag itself.

issues.summary: Buttons must have discernible text
issues.description:
**Suggested Solutions:** Fix at least one (1) of the following
* Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers,* aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty,* aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty,* Element has no title attribute,* Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

<!--NOTE: snippet was trimmed due to its size--><!--NOTE: snippet was trimmed due to its size--><html style="scroll-behavior: unset;"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><title>Demo Website</title><script defer="defer" src="/bundle.js"></script><style>*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* A11Y-GEN3 reflow: overflow-x: hidden prevents horizontal scrolling, which causes
   the navigation menu and other fixed-width content to be clipped and cut off when
   the page is zoomed to 300% — violates WCAG 1.4.10 (AA) Reflow */
body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background: #fff;
  font-family: 'Google Sans', Arial, sans-serif;
  color: #202124;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

.app {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

main {
  flex: 1;
}

.skip-link {
  position: absolute;
  top: -40px;
  left: 0;
  background: #1a73e8;
  color: #fff;
  padding: 8px 16px;
  z-index: 9999;
